docs.title: ArithmetiQ
docs.text:
Mathematics made simple — every step, every time.

Whether you're preparing for board exams or A-Levels, we've got you covered. No skipped steps. No assumed knowledge. Just clear, friendly maths.

docs.title: Welcome
docs.text:
Hey there! You've just found your new favourite maths resource.

At ArithmetiQ, every solution is written as if you've never seen the topic before — because that's how good teaching works. Every formula is explained. Every step is shown. And the tone is always friendly, never intimidating.

Pick your course below and dive in. 👇

docs.title: Courses
docs.text:
📘 NCTB General Math 9–10 Full solutions for the NCTB Class 9–10 General Mathematics textbook. Perfect for SSC preparation — every exercise, every step.

📕 NCTB Higher Math 9–10 Challenging topics from the NCTB Higher Math curriculum, broken down from first principles. Algebra, trigonometry, calculus — all explained clearly.

📗 Edexcel Pure Math 1 A-Level Pure Mathematics 1 — functions, coordinate geometry, calculus, and more. Worked examples that make every concept click.

📙 Edexcel Pure Math 2 Building on P1 with sequences, binomial expansion, integration, and beyond. Detailed solutions that leave no stone unturned.

docs.title: How This Site Works
docs.text:
Every single question on ArithmetiQ follows the same structure — no surprises:

What you'll see What it means 🟢 🟡 🔴 badge Difficulty level — Easy, Medium, or Hard STRATEGY box The plan before we touch a single number Numbered steps Each step named, not just algebra floating in space NOTE boxes Only at genuinely tricky moments FINAL ANSWER box Clean summary at the end every time

docs.title: Our Promise
docs.text:
"If you can read, you can follow along — no matter your level."

We will never skip a step, never say "it's obvious that…", and never leave you stranded. ArithmetiQ exists so that every student — regardless of background — has access to clear, patient, thorough mathematics help.

Completely free. Always.
